title: Governor Gavin Newsom today signed into law Senate Bill 528, a measure by Senator Brian W. Jones (R-Santee), which will help with the health needs of foster children.

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 528 ensures that a foster youth's caregiver is provided with important court documents that approve psychotropic medication prescriptions.",
    "Providing caregivers with an accurate picture of the current and past health history of foster children is essential for their medical care.",
    "Foster children may have been prescribed certain medications due to trauma they endured before a stable placement.",
    "Maintaining consistent medical care is important to the continued health of foster children.",
    "Without an accurate health history, it is difficult for a health provider to determine whether a child still needs certain medications."
  ]
}
```
